# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading both projects in `Kronox.sln` from .NET 8 to .NET 10 (LTS) using an All-at-Once strategy. The two SDK-style ASP.NET Core projects (KronoxApi and KronoxFront) are independent, so they are upgraded together in a single pass, followed by full-solution validation.
**Progress**: 0/2 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%
**Progress**: 0/2 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%
